workdir.description: Optional working directory to run the command in; defaults to the workspace root.

shell.description: Shell binary to launch. Defaults to the user's default shell.

login.description: Whether to run the shell with login semantics. Defaults to true.

tty.description: Whether to keep stdin open for follow-up write_stdin calls. Defaults to false.

raw.description: Bypass automatic optimization that reduces noise. Rerun the command in raw mode if the original output hid important details. Defaults to false.

yield_time_ms.description: How long to wait for command to finish before backgrounding the process. Omit this for most commands.

max_output_tokens.description: Maximum amount of output to return. Excess output will be truncated, and the full log remains available on disk. Omit this unless you want an override.
